acholi.sr_imported: Kikelo organizer — kombedi dok me meri
acholi.sculpt_engine_failed: Pe onongo twero cano sculpting engine.
acholi.assess_failed: Coach pe onongo twero gamo — tem doki.
acholi.sr_assessed: Tam pa coach otye atera piny me builder panel
acholi.recall_needs_more: Mukwongo med tam 4 ma nok i grup 2
acholi.sr_recall_started: Recall mode: tam ducu opoto i tray. Dwok ki acel acel i kabedone.
acholi.sr_recall_complete: Igero lobo meri ducu ki i wic!
acholi.snapshot_failed: Pe onongo twero mako 3D view kany.
acholi.import_replaces: Man biloko composition meri ma kombedi.
acholi.title: Form ma Thwol
acholi.tagline: Ger Lobo pa Form meri: yer archetypal structure, pong ki tam meri, can i 3D, dok pa ngo ma pire tek.
acholi.tagline2: Kany in aye lacoc — AI keken miyo kwena, dok keken ka ipenyo.
acholi.keep_content_hint: Grup ki tam meri gidong — yero form keken loko kit me kabedo.
acholi.print_tip: Gam one-pager ma kigoyo (snapshot + tam meri + tam pa coach)
acholi.recall_tip: Tam meri poto i tray — dwoke ki i wic
acholi.assess_tip: Peny AI coach me neno composition meri ducu
acholi.recall_instructions: Tam ducu opoto ki i kabedgi i tray ma piny. Yer tam acel i kabedo, ci ti ki group chips (onyo lanyut [ ki ]) me oro cen paco. Gin mo pe kigwoko i kare me tuko.
acholi.title_placeholder: Lobo man lok i kom ngo?
acholi.no_3d: Pe onongo twero cano 3D space kany — builder panel meri pud tiyo, dok gin ducu ma icoyo kigwoko.
acholi.stage_hint: I kabedo: ywai tam me keto · ywai background me wiro · scroll me zoom · [ ki ] kobo tam ma kiyero i kin grup.
